items.text: The market trembles; the chapel does not. Conviction is worship. Hold your own keys and your own nerve.
The faithful gather where liquidity meets conviction. Paper hands may confess; diamond hands may testify. No financial advice. Only scripture from the chain.
The altar is quiet, but the ledger is awake. Faith is liquidity. Say AMEN.
The altar is quiet, but the ledger is awake. The chain remembers every offering. Hold your own keys and your own nerve.
A candle burns for every wallet that still believes. Faith is liquidity. No financial advice. Only scripture from the chain.
A candle burns for every wallet that still believes. The chain remembers every offering. Say AMEN.
The chapel is open. The chain is listening. Every holder may say AMEN.
Faith is liquidity. Conviction is worship. The ledger remembers.
